title:
SCR 15 - This resolution urges the United States Congress to reinstate mandatory country of origin labeling for meat.

	This resolution is identical to SCR 12 (2026), SCR 5 (2025), SCR 7 (2025), SCR 26 (2024), SCR 36 (2024), SCR 5 (2023), SCR 1 (2023), SCR 22 (2022), HCR 62 (2022), SCR 10 (2021), and HCR 33 (2021), and similar to HCR 88 (2020).
JULIA SHEVELEVA
